scripts.build: echo 'Building pkg-verbose-44 with verbose output...' && for n in $(seq 1 220); do echo "  [pkg-verbose-44] Processing file $n/220..."; done && echo 'pkg-verbose-44 complete!' && mkdir -p dist && date > dist/.stamp
scripts.test: echo 'Running pkg-verbose-44 test suite...' && for n in $(seq 1 20); do echo "  test $n: PASS"; done && echo 'All tests passed.'
